title: APIP — Avena Property Intelligence Protocol v1.0
description: The open standard for European property intelligence data exchange. Defines the canonical schema for property records including deal scores, yields, developer ratings, market regime classification, and location intelligence.

extensions.pricing.currency: ISO 4217 currency code (default EUR). Added for multi-country support.
extensions.pricing.raw_price_local: Original-currency asking price before FX conversion to EUR.
extensions.source: Provenance block (portal, source_ref, last_synced, url) — required for federated/aggregated ingestion.

deal_score.description: Composite investment score. 40% value + 25% yield + 20% location + 10% quality + 5% risk. 70+ strong, 80+ institutional grade.

yield_gross.description: Estimated gross rental yield percentage from bottom-up ADR model calibrated against AirDNA data.

developer_rating.description: Developer quality tier. AAV = top-tier proven through 2008 cycle, AV = strong, ABV = above average, BBV = average, CV = below average, DV = unrated/new entrant.

market_regime.description: Current market phase classification derived from aggregate discounts, inventory levels, score distributions, and pricing momentum.

liquidity_score.description: Estimated time-to-sale score. Higher values indicate faster expected liquidity based on location demand, pricing, and property characteristics.

carbon_rating.description: Energy/carbon efficiency rating of the property based on official energy performance certificate.

apci_at_listing.description: Avena Property Consciousness Index value at the time of listing. Measures overall market intelligence awareness.

region.description: Coastal region or costa name (e.g. Costa Blanca, Costa del Sol)

beach_km.description: Distance to nearest beach in kilometres

price_per_m2.description: Asking price divided by built area in EUR/m2

market_reference.description: Hyperlocal market reference price per m2 at postal code granularity

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of asking_price (EXTENSION v1)

raw_price_local.description: Original-currency asking price before FX conversion (EXTENSION v1)

source.description: Provenance — required for federated/aggregated ingestion (EXTENSION v1)

last_synced.description: ISO timestamp of last feed sync

url.description: Canonical listing URL on source portal
